# PERF-97 positive: proto.Marshal inside a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-097-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"google.golang.org/protobuf/proto"
)

type Msg struct {
	Text string
}

func MarshalAll(msgs []*Msg) [][]byte {
	out := make([][]byte, 0, len(msgs))
	for _, m := range msgs {
		data, _ := proto.Marshal(m)
		out = append(out, data)
	}
	return out
}
